name: trust-engineering
description: Aggressive trust-building workflows for testing, verification, regression protection, and security assurance in AI-assisted development

interface.shortDescription: Build stronger evidence with tests, verification, and security audits
interface.longDescription: Skills for aggressive trust building in AI-assisted development: high test coverage, mutation testing, UAT and regression protection, fuzzing, static analysis, sanitizer runs, and security-focused code review backed by committed tests.
defaultPrompt: Audit this code for security risks.
